title: Molten Salted Polish Butter Skillet
description: A quick and savory Polish dish featuring molten salted butter, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This diabetic-friendly recipe is made in a traditional cazuela vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Add the sliced smoked sausage to the cazuela and cook over medium heat until browned.
Add the chopped onion to the cazuela and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the cazuela and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced potato to the cazuela and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the paprika, salt, and black pepper to the cazuela and stir to combine.
Create 4 wells in the potato mixture and crack an egg into each well.
Dot the top of the potato mixture with the salted butter.
Transfer the cazuela to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the cazuela from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
